title: Performence-PvP
description: PerformencePvP is a lightweight, optimization-focused PvP modpack that boosts FPS, reduces lag, and keeps gameplay smooth without sacrificing a clean, competitive look. Perfect for duels, survival, or any fast-paced combat.
body: **_PerformencePvP is a lightweight, optimization-focused PvP modpack that boosts FPS, reduces lag, and keeps gameplay smooth without sacrificing a clean, competitive look. Perfect for duels, survival, or any fast-paced combat._**
